verdict.label: Worth checking
verdict.headline: Rey Cortiço Early morning — 08:00
verdict.reason: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.

conversationalSummary.text: REY CORTIÇO this morning around 08:00 is the best bet, but it’s a bit of a rare window so I wouldn’t guess—scan the Surfline cams and MEO Beachcam before you leave. If the sandbanks look lined up and the water’s not too heavy, you should be in for decent conditions since the wind looks nicely set for this slot. With it being a low rising tide, it can still work even if you’re catching the earlier end, so the cam check will really decide whether it’s worth the drive.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Rey Cortiço looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 69 kJ, 8 s period, lully 39/100, and good wind at 15 km/h.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small; 6-9s at low tide can still work on Belgas if the sandbars are lined up, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: scan from the dunes first because banks and channels shift fast.
best.shortExplanation: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide should let the sandbars work without overdoing it.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean small north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 50 kJ, 8 s period, lully 24/100, and good wind at 15 km/h.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered; 6-9s at low tide can still make exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia punchy, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully.
ranked.shortExplanation: Almagreira is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide and timing are lining up well for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a fun-sized window for Worth checking, Low confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 56 kJ, 9 s period, lully 22/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; 6-9s at mid tide stays weak and soft for Supertubos / Molhe Leste.
ranked.shortExplanation: Supertubos is worth a quick check for mid-morning — 11:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide is helping, but the spot still looks serious.
warnings: 6-9s at mid tide stays weak and soft for Supertubos / Molhe Leste

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a small window for Fun progression, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 42 kJ, 8 s period, lully 18/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at mid tide is soft and sectiony on the reef shelves.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is worth a quick check for mid-morning — 11:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide helps a little, but it is not a perfect match.
warnings: 6-9s at mid tide is soft and sectiony on the reef shelves
